description: Style Note Created for today's generation, this lotto shoe embodies the brand's motto - combining technology and high-octane fashion. We think these are just right, both for Sports and for braving the urban jungle, thanks to their nonchalantly sturdy aesthetic. An all-weather staple, the style perfectly suits the cosmopolitan vibe you love! Product Details White shoe with mesh upper, central lace-ups and overlays Meshed and padded tongue and padded inner Rubber midsole Waffle patterned lugs and decoupled heel on a TPU outsole Material and Care Synthetic Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight Remove dust with a dry clean cloth
